title: 10 best herbal creams for foot odor
description: Wintergreen creams helps with foot odor because of its natural antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which effectively combat bacteria and fungi that cause odors. The cream's menthol content also provides a refreshing cooling sensation that helps to reduce sweat production, further minimizing the likelihood of foot odor.
